name: React Native — core rendering (CRITICAL)
description: Prevent production crashes: never leak falsy `0`/`""` with `&&`; always wrap strings in `<Text>`; prefer ternary / `!!` / early return; enable `react/jsx-no-leaked-render` where applicable.

metadata.intent: Fix React Native rendering crashes from conditional JSX and raw strings

must_use: Explicit conditionals for numeric/string edge cases

steps.description: Replace `{name && <Text>…}` / `{count && …}` with ternary, `!!`, or early return so `0` and `""` never render as raw text children of `View`.
Ensure every string literal / interpolation is under `<Text>` (never direct children of `View` / `Pressable` root without `Text`).
